task_completion.description: Open the Jitsi Meet configuration file in a text editor
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., nano, vim, gedit) is open displaying the contents of ~/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js or /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js.

task_completion.description: Set startAudioOnly to true in the configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the text editor, the configuration parameter 'startAudioOnly' is set to 'true' and is uncommented.

task_completion.description: Update video constraints to the specified low bandwidth profile heights
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the text editor, the video constraints section is modified to show height values of ideal: 360, max: 360, and min: 180.

task_completion.description: Access and join a Jitsi meeting in a web browser
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open navigating to the local Jitsi Meet instance and successfully joining a meeting room.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting is joined in an audio-only state
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jitsi meeting interface indicates that video is disabled upon joining (e.g., the camera icon is crossed out, and an avatar or initials are displayed instead of a live video feed).

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the meeting to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., scrot, import) or a GUI screenshot tool is used to save the current screen to exactly '/home/ga/bandwidth_test_evidence.png'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a real web browser to join the meeting
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser window shows standard UI elements (address bar, tabs) and a valid URL for the local Jitsi instance, rather than a mocked or static image.

integrity.description: Verify the configuration file was genuinely edited
integrity.visual_evidence: The changes to config.js are visible within a functional text editor interface, and there is evidence of the file being saved (e.g., editor messages, returning to terminal prompt).

integrity.description: Verify the screenshot was captured dynamically
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent executes a screenshot command or uses a screenshot utility to capture the live meeting state, rather than copying a pre-existing file to the destination.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The configuration file is located at /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js. The target video constraints must be set to ideal: 360, max: 360, and min: 180. The final evidence screenshot must be saved exactly to /home/ga/bandwidth_test_evidence.png.
